steps.title: Identify the key clue
steps.content: The passage explains the reason noses break off: they are “delicate and stick out from the rest of the sculpture, making it especially easy to break.” This description of physical vulnerability is the deciding signal.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content: Fragile (B) is the word that captures exactly this—it means easily damaged or broken. The other three either identify unrelated properties (a nose's distinctiveness, its prevalence, or its artistic refinement) rather than explain why it would break. That matches choice B — B is correct.
